channel.title: Unofficial Hello Internet Relisten
channel.description: The original Hello Internet files, republished on Fridays starting May 1st, 2026. For discussion, see the newly liberated subreddit http://old.reddit.com/r/HelloInternet. Long live the Tims!
channel.itunes:author: Tim

item.title: Episode #0 (Test) - You're a Grand Old Flag
item.description:
Hi, Tims. This is a test episode to make sure that the podcast feed is working. If you're interested in more information, please see https://github.com/inahaystack/unofficial-hi-relisten/.

In the spirit of Hello Internet, it's a public domain (no freebooting) song about a flag recorded on a wax cylinder.
item.content:encoded:
Hi, Tims. This is a test episode to make sure that the podcast feed is working. If you're interested in more information, please see https://github.com/inahaystack/unofficial-hi-relisten/.

In the spirit of Hello Internet, it's a public domain (no freebooting) song about a flag recorded on a wax cylinder.
